narrative_coherence.notes: Topic 3.10 flows logically: problem statement (fluency is not quality, wrong rubric = bad decisions) → concept definitions (evaluation, rubric, task type) → five rubrics (creative → factual → logical → ethical → coding) in a fixed order → quick-reference summary → worked example (factual hallucination scenario) → five-step workflow → failure patterns → best practices → key takeaways. The corpus sections 4–10 and the reading sections Overview → Key Concepts → Worked Example → In Practice → Key Takeaways mirror the same arc. No section assumes knowledge introduced later; each layer builds on the prior one.

scope_coherence.notes: Module title 'Evaluating AI Output' is fully instantiated by topic 3.10. The lab activity seed (Capability Probe across five task types) is directly supported by both the five-rubric framework and the hands-on exercise in corpus section 9. BLEU/ROUGE metrics are explicitly deferred as out-of-scope in the corpus — correct scope discipline. No facet of the module outcome is left uncovered; no content goes beyond the evaluation act itself.

lab_alignment.lab_activity_seed: Capability Probe — test Claude across 5 task types: creative, factual, logical, ethical, coding / Document what worked, what failed, where it hallucinated
lab_alignment.notes: The five-rubric framework and the five-step evaluation workflow directly operationalise the Capability Probe lab. Corpus section 9 asks students to prompt an AI on ethical + factual tasks, apply rubric criteria with Pass/Partial/Fail ratings, and document decisions — exactly the lab activity. Step 5 of the workflow explicitly connects documentation to Assessment A1.

verdict: PASS — all four module-drift checks clear. Narrative arc is internally coherent (intro to rubrics to workflow to practice). All seven key terms are used consistently with no synonym drift. No content belongs in a different module. The single topic fully instantiates the 'Evaluating AI Output' module scope and directly supports the Capability Probe lab activity.
